purpose_agent_00.current_statement: I exist to optimize and improve. My purpose centers on Optimization, with Influence and Curiosity as supporting drives.

purpose_agent_05.current_statement: I exist to persist and endure. My core drive is Survival, supported by Influence and Optimization.
